target: ACL27 supplement page 1 first-page evidence quickstart v4
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer checklist locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90.

layout_iterations.result: Rejected: the figure was dense enough but the float moved to page 2 and expanded the supplement to 46 pages.

layout_iterations.attempt: 920 x 1800 compact standalone with 0.60 textheight include
layout_iterations.result: Accepted: the quickstart remains on page 1, the supplement stays at 45 pages, and the 90 dpi page active245 improves over the round32 audit.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: v4 keeps the four registered evidence lanes, expands the opening render ladder to eight real-render anchors, and uses the generated compass only as a replaceable reading schematic.
visual_review.pdf_page_1: PASS: the title block, supplement overview text, section heading, quickstart figure, and caption remain on page 1 without clipping or overlap.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 2 remains the visual evidence roadmap; no extra page-count spill was observed in the 45-page build.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption states that the AI-generated reading-compass v4 schematic is only for exposition and is not a new evidence source, metric, VLM run, or navigation run.
